positive: A stylized, symmetrical celestial forest scene. Imagine glowing bioluminescent flora and fauna set against a deep twilight sky. The main subject is a central archway or tree portal, surrounded by abstract nebulae shapes and geometric constellations. Use high contrast between deep indigo blues, vibrant magenta accents, emerald greens, and luminous gold highlights. The style should be highly graphic and vector-inspired, utilizing clean silhouettes and sharp linework, optimized for seamless repetition and apparel printing. Intricate detail, minimalist depth, magical realism, symmetrical composition.
negative: blur, artifacts, noise, text, watermark, logo, signature, bad anatomy, extra limbs, messy, clutter, lowres, monochrome, gradient noise
